name: Cedric Hardwicke
abstract: Sir Cedric Webster Hardwicke (19 February 1893 – 6 August 1964) was an English stage and film actor whose career spanned over 50 years. His theatre work included notable performances in productions of the plays of Shakespeare and Shaw, and his film work included leading roles in several adapted literary classics.

works.t: Man and Superman: Act 3, Scene 2. Don Juan in Hell

about_quotes.speaker: Alberta Hunter
